title: rosa gallica f. pumila
intro: Rosa gallica f. pumila, also known as Dwarf French Rose, is a compact and fragrant shrub native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rosa gallica f. pumila include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
